title: pleopeltis regularis
intro: Pleopeltis regularis, also known as the common polypody or rockcap fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the Americas. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as supporting immune function and detoxification. In herbal preparations, Pleopeltis regularis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat coughs, colds, and other conditions related to the respiratory system.
